data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a southerly airstream, it will be hot over the coast of Guangdong in the next few days. An anticyclone aloft will cover the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China early next week. The weather will be generally fine over the region. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring a few showers to southern China in the latter part of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260411","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"South force 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
